scripts.sync:android-icons: npx expo prebuild --platform android --no-install && node scripts/patch-android-splash.mjs
scripts.build:apk: node scripts/patch-android-splash.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-signing.mjs && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:aab: node scripts/patch-android-splash.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-signing.mjs && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.build:android-apk: npm run prebuild:android && npm run build:apk
scripts.build:android-aab: npm run prebuild:android && npm run build:aab
